name: Resource Utilisation
subject: Resource Utilisation Report: {project_name} ({date})
body_html:
Dear {project_manager},

Below is the Resource Utilisation graph for {project_name} as of {date}. The chart is also attached as an SVG file.

{svg_inline}

Periods of over-allocation (usage exceeding 100%) are highlighted in red and may require immediate attention — consider levelling, splitting, or re-assigning tasks as appropriate.

Summary

  • View exported: {view_name}
  • Date generated: {date}
  • Project: {project_name}

Kind regards,
{project_manager}
